goals: Keep backend headless and CLI-first while allowing agent clients to evolve independently.
Freeze the current API surface as a versioned contract even though the runtime URLs are still unversioned.
Let agent and CLI clients consume documented stable fields and ignore extra debug/diagnostic payloads.

compatibility.contract_versioning_strategy: Document versioning via /api/contracts/runtime-v1, not via URL path changes.
compatibility.unknown_fields_policy: Agent and CLI clients must ignore unknown object fields.
compatibility.nullable_fields_policy: Missing and null should be treated equivalently unless explicitly required.
compatibility.error_normalization_recommendation: Client SDK should normalize flat {error} and {status,error} bodies into one client-side error type.

cross_domain_feedback_fragment.description: Commander bounded workflows and ask_stock responses expose a shared feedback fragment for user-readable gate/audit summaries.

flatError.description: Most current endpoints return a flat error body on non-2xx.

statusError.description: Config mutation endpoints may return a status-bearing error body.

runtimeStatus.description: Commander runtime snapshot. Frontend should rely on documented top-level sections and ignore unknown fields inside nested diagnostic objects.

trainingExecution.description: Result of executing a training plan or the convenience /api/train shortcut.

dataSourceUnavailableError.description: Structured 503 payload returned when live training data could not be resolved and mock mode was not explicitly enabled.

responseFeedback.description: Standard cross-domain feedback fragment returned by Commander-backed workflows and stock-analysis responses.

responseNextAction.description: Standard cross-domain next-action fragment derived from feedback and gate state.

responseEnvelope.description: Unified response envelope for Commander natural-language and bounded workflow responses.

protocol.resume_behavior: best-effort only; client should reconnect and refresh status if history gaps occur

endpoints.summary: Return a pollable recent-event summary with optional human-readable rendering.

cases: view must be one of: json, human

notes: Suitable for polling when SSE consumption is unnecessary.
JSON responses also include `human_reply` and `display` fields for agent or human relay.

endpoints.summary: Send a natural-language message to Commander.

cases: Commander runtime is not initialized or background loop is unavailable.

notes: Provide session_key/chat_id to continue a multi-turn API conversation; omit them for isolated one-shot requests.

endpoints.summary: Open a session-bound SSE stream for runtime events plus the final Commander reply.

cases: Commander runtime is not initialized or background loop is unavailable.

notes: If the request fails after the stream is opened, `summary` is followed by `error` instead of `reply` and `done`.
The `runtime_event` payload contains phase labels, risk hints, confirmation state, artifacts, and human relay text.
This is event streaming for runtime state; it does not stream LLM tokens.
